condition_specific: Bladder, blood, brain, breast, cervical, esophageal, intestinal, kidney, lymphatic, lung, prostate, rectal, respiratory tract, skin, testicular, thyroid cancer; leukemia, multiple myeloma, non-Hodgkin's lymphoma
filing_deadline_notes: Claimant must bring claim within 2 years following diagnosis date
notes: Requires 3 years of active service (1,250 hours/year for paid members; active status per department for volunteers). Statute is a benefit fund, not a WC presumption — no rebuttability language. Benefits: early-stage $5,000 lump sum; advanced-stage $20,000 lump sum; combined lifetime max $40,000. Monthly disability: Class 1 (paid active) = lesser of 60% salary or $4,000/month; Class 2 (other eligible) = $1,500/month; up to 36 months duration. Paid and volunteer firefighters both covered; also covers EMTs, paramedics, fire instructors, fire marshals, fire police.

notes: Volunteer active status defined per individual department. Requires 3 years active service. Monthly disability benefit for Class 2: $1,500/month up to 36 months. Statute explicitly covers volunteer firefighters.
